name: @forgeax/bevy-smooth-follow
description: Reproduction of Bevy's `smooth_follow` example (a red sphere smoothly chasing a moving blue target) — a MOTION demo exercising createApp's managed frame-loop + auto-Time resource + chained world.addSystem Update systems driving vec3.smoothDamp, the new frame-rate-independent damping helper mapping Bevy's Vec3::smooth_nudge.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle downstream of engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: smooth-follow demo; fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room gates

bench.reason: smooth-follow demo; bench focus on engine-math / pixel-parity

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; Bevy smooth_follow reproduction
